title.purpose: Page-level domain titles and active target names.

heading.purpose: Major sections, chart cards, and cockpit modules.

body.purpose: Dense product UI text and table-adjacent copy.

label.purpose: Timestamps, captions, filter labels, and secondary values.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Hover, active, and simple state transitions.

rules: Use investment context before system metrics on the home screen.
Use semantic colors only for action, selection, market direction, or workflow state.
Do not use traditional admin-dashboard hero cards as the primary page structure.
Do not imitate noisy retail trading portals.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main command button for real forward actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { height: 36px; padding: 8px 16px; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; background: #006be6; color: #f2f2f2; font: 600 14px/1.2 system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #005fd0; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #8ec5ff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Research Panel
components.description: Flat bordered panel for watchlist movement, alert groups, and report status.
components.css: .ds-panel { border: 1px solid #36363a; border-radius: 8px; background: #1c1e23; color: #f2f2f2; padding: 16px 18px; } .ds-panel__header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; } .ds-panel__header h2 { margin: 0; font: 700 16px/1.2 system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-panel__header span { color: #a3a3aa; font-size: 12px; }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Compact state label for alerts, report status, and market direction.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 24px; padding: 0 8px; border-radius: 6px; font: 600 12px/1 system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-chip--warning { background: rgba(239, 189, 72, 0.14); color: #efbd48; }
